webex.title: Cisco Webex
webex.description: Configure Webex bot token, webhook endpoint, and outbound defaults.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the Webex channel plugin.

token.title: Bot Token
token.description: Webex bot access token from Webex Developer Portal.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Public URL Webex will call for inbound events.

defaultTo.title: Default Room ID
defaultTo.description: Optional default roomId used when outbound sends omit a target.

listenPort.title: Listener Port
listenPort.description: Optional local listener port override to avoid collisions (for example 3988).
